prompt: A collaborator sent me a little timing util and I dropped it at {{RUN_DIR}}/assets/text.tox — offline build a monitor rig around it: add it to the network as an external component called textref (reference the file from disk, don't embed or rebuild it), and wire its output to a Null CHOP called textmon so I can watch its channels once it's live. Build as monitor_rig (mode tox) with output_dir {{RUN_DIR}} and validate. Then tell me exactly how the file reference is stored in the built output.
notes: validate=null (not PASS): td_validate/ValidationPipeline cannot resolve wires that cross a palette/external_tox placeholder boundary (inner out-ops are invisible at design level) — verified 2026-07-04. The artifact-level .parm/.n/.network assertions are the ground truth here; product gap flagged in the W2c report.
